monthlyLinkVelocityTarget: 4-8 legitimate local, niche, partner, or editorial referring domains per month
guardrails: No PBNs, link farms, fake guest-post networks, or paid dofollow links sold only for SEO.
Paid placements must be marked sponsored/nofollow when required.
Prioritize local relevance, real readership, topical relevance, and proof pages over raw volume.

linkTargets.anchorGuidance: garage door spring replacement in Pleasanton; broken spring repair; Valiant Garage Door spring replacement
linkTargets.reason: Search Atlas shows strong opportunity around spring timing, same-day spring replacement, and broken spring safety.

linkTargets.reason: Search Atlas visibility is missing for emergency response-time and 24/7 East Bay booking queries.

campaigns.name: Annual Community Garage Door Project PR

targets: home improvement blogs with editorial review

campaigns.nextAction: Offer Valentino Ramirez as the source for a 600-900 word safety article on what homeowners should do after a spring breaks.

campaigns.name: Referral Partner Resource Links
campaigns.nextAction: Ask partners to link to /partners or /instant-estimate from vendor/resource pages.

campaigns.name: Citation and Profile Authority Cleanup
campaigns.nextAction: Keep NAP identical and route all verified profile links back to the strongest service or proof pages where allowed.

campaigns.name: Generic Paid Guest Post Marketplaces
campaigns.recommendation: skip unless nofollow/sponsored and real audience value exists
campaigns.nextAction: Do not buy dofollow authority links purely for ranking.
